THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARBUTT, DOROTHY HUIDOR, MIGUEL CANN, COLETTE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3348 - 21ST STREET, S.F., STAYED UNTIL JUL-31-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 11:59PM. DEFTS FORFEIT $2,200- SECURITY DEPOSIT. PLTF TO RETURN $1,000- UPON SATISFACTORY INSPECTION OF PREMISES. DEFTS SHALL DISMISS ANY AND ALL COMPLAINTS ON OR BEFORE JUNE 20,1997. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ANY AND ALL CLAIMS. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
